title: hieracium olivaceum subsp. praerosum
intro: Hieracium olivaceum subsp. praerosum, also known as the lesser hawkweed or mountain hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its yellow flowers and small, winged leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium olivaceum subsp. praerosum include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
